Search Results for

    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Class Node

    A node in the node hierarchy. When the node contains skin, all mesh.primitives MUST contain JOINTS_0 and WEIGHTS_0 attributes. A node MAY have either a matrix or any combination of translation/rotation/scale (TRS) properties. TRS properties are converted to matrices and postmultiplied in the T * R * S order to compose the transformation matrix; first the scale is applied to the vertices, then the rotation, and then the translation. If none are provided, the transform is the identity. When a node is targeted for animation (referenced by an animation.channel.target), matrix MUST NOT be present.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB

    Syntax
    public sealed class Node : LogicalChildOfRoot, IExtraProperties, IChildOf<GlbData>, IVisualNodeContainer

    Properties

    Name Description
    Camera

    Gets or sets the Camera of this Node.
    IsSkinJoint

    Gets a value indicating whether this node is used as a Bone joint in a Skin.
    IsSkinSkeleton

    Gets a value indicating whether this node is used as a Skeleton node in a Skin.
    IsTransformAnimated

    Gets a value indicating whether this transform is affected by any animation.
    LocalMatrix

    Gets or sets the local transform Matrix4x4 of this Node.
    LocalTransform

    Gets or sets the local Scale, Rotation and Translation of this Node.
    Mesh

    Gets or sets the Mesh of this Node.
    MorphWeights

    Gets the Morph Weights of this Node.
    PunctualLight

    Gets or sets the PunctualLight of this Node.
    Skin

    Gets or sets the Skin of this Node.
    VisualChildren

    Gets the visual children Node instances contained in this Node.
    VisualParent

    Gets the visual parent Node instance that contains this Node.
    VisualRoot

    Gets the visual root Node instance that contains this Node.
    VisualScenes

    Gets the collection of Scene instances that reference this Node.
    WorldMatrix

    Gets or sets the world Matrix4x4 of this Node.

    Methods

    Name Description
    CreateNode(string)

    Creates a new Node instance, adds it to and references it as a child in the current graph.
    DeserializeProperty(string, ref Utf8JsonReader)

    Reads the properties of the current instance from a System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader.
    FindNodesUsingMesh(Mesh)

    Gets a collection of Node instances using mesh.
    FindNodesUsingSkin(Skin)

    Gets a collection of Node instances using skin.
    Flatten(IVisualNodeContainer)

    Returns all the Node instances of a visual hierarchy as a flattened list.
    GetCurveSamplers(Animation)
    GetGpuInstancing()
    GetLocalTransform(Animation, float)

    Gets the local transform of this node in a given animation at a given time.
    GetMorphWeights()
    GetWorldMatrix(Animation, float)

    Gets the world matrix of this node in a given animation at a given time.
    OnValidateContent(ValidationContext)
    OnValidateReferences(ValidationContext)
    RemoveGpuInstancing()
    SerializeProperties(Utf8JsonWriter)

    Writes the properties of the current instance to a System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter.
    SetMorphWeights(SparseWeight8)
    UseGpuInstancing()
